name: HNS_ACTIONS_
description: HNS ACTIONS. This table stores all Action related data.

columns.Name: ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Unique system generated identifier for Action table.

columns.Name: ACTION_NO
columns.Comments: Unique user-defined identifierfor Action table.

columns.Name: RECOMMEND_ID
columns.Comments: Recommendation Identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INVEST_RECOMMENDS table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_ID
columns.Comments: Incident Identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_SUMMARY.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Completed flag. Signifies whether the Action is completed.

columns.Name: ACTION_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: ACTION_STATUS_CODE column: Current Action Status. Lookup to FND_LOOKUP STATUS.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag. Signifies whether the Action is deleted..

columns.Name: ACTION_SUMMARY
columns.Comments: Summary information for an Action.This is a user entered field.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Detailed description for an Action.This is a user entered field.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of Action identifier.E.g. Corrective, preventive

columns.Name: PRIORITY_CODE
columns.Comments: Priority Identifier. Seed data from FND_LOOKUP with Lookup Type = HNS_PRIORITY

columns.Name: REQ_RESOURCES
columns.Comments: Required Resources for an action. The column is comma delimited with the req resources will be separated by comma.

columns.Name: ACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date when the action was created and assigned to the action owner.

columns.Name: ACTION_REVIEWER_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag  to send email notification to action reviewer.

columns.Name: ACTION_APPROVER_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag  to send email notification to action approver.

columns.Name: ACTION_PRECOM_EMAIL_FLAG
columns.Comments: The flag  to send email notification to action precomm approver.

columns.Name: LESSONS_LEARNED
columns.Comments: Lessons Learned.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ESTIMATED_COST
columns.Comments: Estimated cost associated with the Action.

columns.Name: EST_COST_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: Estimated Cost Currency Code. Currency code related to the estimated cost. Default to USD.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
